channel.title: bluesky on syui.cf
channel.description: Recent content in bluesky on syui.cf

item.title: blueskyのatprotoをbuildしてみた
item.description: https://github.com/bluesky-social/atproto 開発にはlernaを採用しているぽい。 $ git clone https://github.com/bluesky-social/atproto $ cd atproto $ node -v $ nvm use v18 # https://www.npmjs.com/package/lerna $ npm i -g lerna $ npm i $ lerna run build or $ npm run build $ ls packages/*/dist/ $ ls packages/*/*.env $ cat packages/*/*.env DB_POSTGRES_URL="postgres://bsky:yksb@localhost/pds_dev" $ npm run verify $ npm run prettier $ npm run test https://github.com/bluesky-social/atproto-website $ npm run dev
